$comment: Plugin ideas that aren't built yet. The release pipeline merges these into dist-pcplugins/index.json with comingSoon: true. The Paperclip Plugin Manager renders them with a 'Coming soon' badge and the install endpoint rejects them server-side. Add an entry below to surface a new idea in the host UI — required fields are `id`, `displayName`, and `description`. Everything else is optional. When a stub becomes a real plugin (a `plugins/<id>/` folder ships with the same id), remove its entry here — the built plugin takes precedence either way.

plugins.description: First-class smart-home control — lights, locks, thermostat, cameras, sensors — exposed as agent tools. Currently reachable via a skill, but no MCP tools.
Two-way SMS/MMS via 3CX, Twilio, or Vonage. Distinct from phone-tools (voice) — for quick confirmations, reminders, and customer follow-ups.
Google Calendar as a focused MCP plugin with richer tools — free/busy checks, bulk reschedule, attendee management. More powerful for agents than the broad google-workspace plugin.
QuickBooks Online: invoices, P&L pulls, AP aging, reconciliation triggers. Closes the loop for CFO Agent on any company running QBO.
E-signature request and status tracking — vendor contracts, real-estate docs, corporate agreements. Pairs naturally with docgen-tools.
Outreach, connection pipeline, profile lookups. Feeds M&A Agent and CEO Agent for deal sourcing and business development.
Full CRM operations — contacts, deals, pipelines, sequences. Closes the gap between marketing (CMO) and sales tracking.
Schedule meetings, retrieve recordings, pull transcripts. CEO and COO use this for meeting prep and follow-up.
Read-only bank and card transaction feeds via Plaid or direct bank APIs. Enables personal finance monitoring and business cash-flow alerts.
Flexible structured-database access for custom workflows that don't fit issue tracking.
Read and write Notion pages and databases. Useful when team wikis or docs live in Notion.
WhatsApp Business API for customer-facing communication where customers prefer WhatsApp over email.
Ecom operations for Shopify storefronts — orders, inventory, customers, fulfillment. Closes the revenue/inventory gap stripe-tools and revenuecat-tools don't cover.
Amazon Seller / Vendor Central operations — orders, inventory, listings, FBA. Closes the revenue/inventory gap stripe-tools and revenuecat-tools don't cover.
Weather data for scheduling outdoor home projects, travel planning, and flagging weather-sensitive business decisions.
PDF/Word document generation from templates — contracts, proposals, reports. Pairs naturally with docusign-tools.

Pull and reply to customer reviews across Google Business Profile, Facebook, Trustpilot, Apple App Store, Google Play, and more. Per-service on/off toggles so each company connects only what it uses. Read tools surface new reviews; submit tools post replies. Pairs with the Review Reply Agent for drafting, approval, and policy-driven auto-reply.
